session.user: Run ruff linter and formatter check on the new and modified files and report results: ``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py 2>&1 && ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py 2>&1 ```

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py 2>&1

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py 2>&1
Run ruff format check on modified files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 F841 Local variable `expected_base` is assigned to but never used --> src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py:221:9 | 220 | # Next branch should have this branch as its expected base 221 | expected_base = branch | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 222 | 223 | return entries | help: Remove assignment to unused variable `expected_base`

I001 [*] Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted --> tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py:6:1 | 4 | """ 5 | 6 | / from pathlib import Path 7 | |

session.assistant:
ruff failed: 3 linting issues found, 2 files would be reformatted
**Linting Issues:**
1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py:221` - F841: Local variable `expected_base` is assigned to but never used 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py:276` - E501: Line too long (102 > 100 characters) 3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py:6` - I001: Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted (fixable)

- `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py` would be reformatted - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py` would be reformatted - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py` is already formatted correctly
The issues to address are: 1. Remove the unused `expected_base` variable assignment in land_stack.py line 221 2. Split the long line at line 276 to be under 100 characters 3. Sort imports in test_land_stack.py
